name: soria-stack
description: Codex-native Soria workflow guidance (MCP-first) plus the fast $B browse flow from Soria-Inc/soria-stack.

interface.shortDescription: Soria workflow guidance, engineering tests/review, and fast $B browser QA for Codex
interface.longDescription: Brings the Soria pipeline, dive, and engineering workflows from Soria-Inc/soria-stack into Codex. Routes pipeline verbs through the Soria MCP (mcp__soria__*), authors dbt SQL and React dives locally in git, and adds branch dev-env, test, and code-review skills for Soria app engineering work.
defaultPrompt: Use Soria Stack to inventory what exists for this concept via the Soria MCP
Use browse to verify this dive and capture evidence quickly
Use test to choose the right proof layer for this Soria code change
Use code-review to review this Soria diff against repo-specific patterns
Help me promote this dive to prod via warehouse_promote + PR + CI
